headline: PTC: An Undervalued Digital Moat In Industrial Software
summary: PTC Inc. stock is a Buy as Creo & Windchill drive R&D lock-in, 27% RPO growth, and 95% recurring revenue, plus $365M buybacks. Click here to read more on PTC.
